The '''Abron system''', also known as the '''Alpheridies system''', contained a [[Red dwarf/Legends|red dwarf]] [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Aber (star)|Aber]], and the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alpheridies/Legends|Alpheridies]]. It was the home to the [[Alpheridian]]s and the [[Miraluka/Legends|Miraluka]].

{{System-stub}}
